items.claim: RJ Harris has knockout power in his hands.
Alvin Hines has a history of using anabolic steroids.
items.quote: he got cooked by uh the UFC's drug testing cuz he was taking anabolic steroids

items.claim: Alvin Hines's durability is negatively impacted by no longer using performance-enhancing drugs.
items.quote: when you're taking steroids, you're going to have better durability... now he's not using the PEDs, which I think does change things a lot

items.claim: Alvin Hines has a habit of leaving his head on the center line in the pocket.
items.quote: Alvin Hines, he comes in the pocket with that head on the center line

items.claim: Stuart Nickel has a 0-3 record in the UFC.
items.quote: Stuart nickel who's 0 and 3 in the UFC

items.claim: Stuart Nickel has a bad habit of throwing spinning attacks that leave him vulnerable.
items.quote: Nickel has the bad habit of like throwing a lot of spinning attacks... it can get you taken down or it can get you knocked out

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is past his prime at 42 years old.
items.quote: Jared Cannonier 5 years ago, I'd have a fight for CLD... but in 2026 at 42... an aged explosive striker past his prime

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has a speed advantage over Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: I think that Christian Leroy Duncan shows his speed advantage

items.claim: Roman Dolidze successfully used grappling to give Christian Leroy Duncan problems.
items.quote: We saw Roman Dolidze give CLD some problems with his grappling

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is inactive and has only fought once in the last year.
items.quote: Usman, you know, since that point has one fight against Joaquin Buckley a year ago. He's not active.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is the only fighter in the UFC to land a takedown on Hamzat Chimaev.
items.quote: He's also the only guy in the UFC to ever land a takedown on Hamzat Chimaev
